name: logistics carriers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 10–20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile freight bills with shipment logs instead of manual reconciliation of freight bills and shipment logs.
problem_solved: discrepancies between freight bills and shipment logs
features: manual entry for freight bill and shipment log data

locked_fields.primary_problem: discrepancies between freight bills and shipment logs
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For logistics carriers processing 10–20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile freight bills with shipment logs instead of manual reconciliation of freight bills and shipment logs.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual reconciliation of freight bills and shipment logs
must_have_features: manual entry for freight bill and shipment log data

one_liner: For logistics carriers processing 10–20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile freight bills with shipment logs instead of manual reconciliation of freight bills and shipment logs.
